title: Claude Code Just Gave Everyone Virtual Pets (April Fools?)

extracted.hook: Yesterday, Claude Code's entire source code was leaked and people started digging through it and we saw little teasers of a buddy system.
transitions: So, I'm gonna show you guys exactly how to set this up
Now, let's just hop into this doc so I can explain to you guys exactly how this works and what it is.
The last thing I wanted to do here is I wanted to just shoot it off on kind of a longer task and see if Vortex says or does anything as it's coding.
extracted.cta: "if you learned something new or you enjoyed, please give it a like. It helps me out a ton."

accelerate: discussing the different types of characters and rarities
slow: explaining the process of hatching a pet
